creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
Hi Tomasz,

This is very awesome indeed. Some observations:
* You can mark your previous attachments on this bug report as obsolete, this removes them from immediately being presented to users reading this bug report
* It looks like your changes, and the Makefile at large could use some love from the various related Port tools (ports-mgmt/portfmt[1], ports-mgmt/portlint[2])

1: https://www.freshports.org/ports-mgmt/portfmt
2: https://www.freshports.org/ports-mgmt/portlint
